diagrams.title: PKI Architecture and Components
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchical structure of PKI with all key components
elements: Certificate Repository - Stores certificates and CRLs
Certificate Revocation List (CRL) - Published revoked certificates
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete PKI ecosystem and how components interact

diagrams.title: Certificate Chain/Trust Chain
diagrams.description: Visual representation of certificate validation path
elements: Verification arrows showing trust flow from bottom to top
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how certificates are validated through a chain of trust from end-entity to trusted root

diagrams.title: X.509 Certificate Structure
diagrams.description: Internal structure and fields of an X.509 digital certificate
diagrams.purpose: Learning the exact fields in an X.509 certificate and their purposes
